provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, lean black man in his 40s with greying temples and flight crew insignia on his collar, wearing an olive flight deck coverall with a reflective safety vest over it, ear protection muffs around his neck, heavy heat-resistant gloves hanging from a belt clip, mag-lock boots with orange toe caps, a flight deck comm headset, he marshals shuttle launches and his hand signals mean life or death on the deck

judgment.explanation: Compact faction crew. Regulation shipboard clothing with appropriate wear and institutional identity markers. Muted palette, functional design.
